enum_values.name: Network
enum_values.summary: A network license that has not been fulfilled by a Zoo

enum_values.name: NetworkLoanedOut
enum_values.summary: A license on temporary loan from a Zoo

enum_values.name: NetworkCheckedOut
enum_values.summary: A license on permanent check out from a Zoo

enum_values.name: CloudZoo
enum_values.summary: A lease granted by the Cloud Zoo
